utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final package: (1) destination – present and fully specified (name, country, region). (2) travel_dates – present and fully specified with start and end dates. (3) transportation – present with flight details and cost. (4) accommodation – present with name, type, rating, amenities, and total cost. (5) activities – present with list and total cost. (6) additional_services – present with special requests (though no costs, but item exists). (7) total_budget – present with breakdown and currency. All 7 items are covered and reasonably fully specified according to the requirements.
